rows.label: qev055601_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hmm... This could be called a difficult situation.
Now, what should be done...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0002
rows.name:
That entity takes rather incomprehensible actions...
To intentionally venture into a dangerous zone...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev055601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what is wrong.

rows.label: qev055601_JNK0020
rows.name: Comfort

rows.label: qev055601_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him that you will listen if he has any worries.

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0003
rows.name:
My divided entity, Nen'osarag,
has dashed out of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0004
rows.name: It seems she went to the Nightglow Forest, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0005
rows.name:
I completely fail to understand why she would venture
into a zone infested with such creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0006
rows.name:
However, for some reason, I have the sensation
that I cannot simply leave her be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0007
rows.name:
I see, do Earthlings call this incomprehensible
psychological state "worry"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0008
rows.name:
To tell the truth, my divided entity, Nen'osarag,
has dashed out of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0009
rows.name: It seems she went to the Nightglow Forest, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Why would she venture into a zone infested
with such creatures...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0011
rows.name:
The reasoning behind Nen'osarag's actions is something
I fail to understand, along with this emotion called "worry."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0012
rows.name: I wish to go bring her back, but I am at a disadvantage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0013
rows.name:
This is because the combat capabilities of the Orphe
cannot be called high when compared to Mira's native creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0014
rows.name: Could you please go and save my divided entity?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0015
rows.name:
Earthlings truly are an active
and combative species.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0016
rows.name: Of course, I am saying this with what you would call "gratitude."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0017
rows.name:
Please be careful not to get injured.
Although, even if you sustain some level of injury...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0018
rows.name:
...It is OK as long as you
bring back my divided entity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0019
rows.name:
That is what you call a trade-off.
I am counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_JNK0030
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev055601_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell him to leave it to you.

rows.label: qev055601_JNK0040
rows.name: Comprehend

rows.label: qev055601_SEL0041
rows.name:
Think to yourself that this is an alien
with a rather cool way of asking for a favor.

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0020
rows.name:
What a tolerant attitude.
Is it true that Earthlings call someone who listens to
another's requests "tolerant"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0021
rows.name:
Then I leave it to you.
Please bring back my divided entity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0022
rows.name:
Is this considered a cool way of speaking
for an Earthling?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0023
rows.name:
Understood.
I will endeavor to use words that are as "hot" as possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0024
rows.name: That will boost an Earthling's motivation more, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0025
rows.name:
Then I'm counting on ya!
Bring back my divided entity, Nen'osarag!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0026
rows.name:
...How is this?
I am leaving the matter in your hands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0027
rows.name: Please bring back my divided entity, Nen'osarag![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0028
rows.name:
Was Nen'osarag safe?
I feel relieved.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_JNK0050
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev055601_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask if he knows what "relief" feels like.

rows.label: qev055601_JNK0060
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev055601_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask if he actually hadn't forgotten about her.

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0029
rows.name: Is this the emotion known as "relief"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0030
rows.name:
However, my psychological state becoming this unstable
can only be called illogical.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0031
rows.name:
Even if Nen'osarag were to die out,
as long as we have Senirapa Water...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0032
rows.name: ...our individuals will continue to multiply.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0033
rows.name:
There is no way I could forget.
Nen'osarag is one of our brethren.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0034
rows.name: I was suddenly struck by a strangely turbulent emotional feeling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0035
rows.name:
Come to think of it, it is quite strange.
Even if Nen'osarag were to die out,
as long as we have Senirapa Water...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0036
rows.name:
...our individuals will continue to multiply, so perhaps I expended
more thought than necessary on Nen'osarag's future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0037
rows.name: Were you lonely without me, Nan'osarag?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0038
rows.name: Lonely? What is that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0039
rows.name:
Why would I become lonely
just because Nen'osarag is gone?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_JNK0070
rows.name: Point Out

rows.label: qev055601_SEL0071
rows.name: Point out that he has fallen in love.

rows.label: qev055601_JNK0080
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev055601_SEL0081
rows.name: Suggest that it's because she's a rare new Orphean species.

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0040
rows.name:
Fall in love?
That is a phenomenon that occurs in species with distinct sexes, is it not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0041
rows.name:
The Orphe have no distinct sexes.
Therefore, there is no way such an emotion would occur...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0042
rows.name:
However, it is true that I find Nen'osarag's appearance
to be beautiful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0043
rows.name: Hmm... Is this what it means to be "in love"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0044
rows.name:
Nen'osarag!
Am I in love with you!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0045
rows.name:
You should be able to figure that out yourself!
In Earthling terms, that's what you call being dense![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0046
rows.name:
Dense... My brain should be functioning perfectly well...
She says the strangest things...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0049
rows.name:
You have a point...
But what could this strange psychological state be?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0050
rows.name: When I look at Nen'osarag, I find her beautiful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0051
rows.name: You just like me, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0052
rows.name:
Like? Like?
Do I like Nen'osarag?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0053
rows.name:
You can't figure that out yourself?
In Earthling terms, that's what you call being naive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0054
rows.name: Naive... She says the strangest things...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0055
rows.name:
To think there are things even I, a highly intelligent organism,
cannot understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0056
rows.name:
I don't understand my feelings towards Nen'osarag.
Why is this!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0057
rows.name: ...That is why you are naive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055601_MSG0058
rows.name:
Gah! I still do not understand!
Ovah! Please guide me![ST:wait ]
